items.title: Nepal swears in ex-rapper as new prime minister
items.dek: Balendra Shah won the election by a landslide promising change to Nepalis who are angry at corruption.
items.body: Balendra Shah won the election by a landslide promising change to Nepalis who are angry at corruption.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Singapore denies Malaysian scholar entry, calling her 'undesirable visitor'
items.dek: Fadiah Nadwa Fikri urged some in Singapore to "adopt her brand of radical advocacy", authorities say.
items.body: Fadiah Nadwa Fikri urged some in Singapore to "adopt her brand of radical advocacy", authorities say.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Panic buying prompts PM to reassure Australians over fuel supply
items.dek: Anthony Albanese says nation's supply remains "secure" amid reports of panic buying and shortages.
items.body: Anthony Albanese says nation's supply remains "secure" amid reports of panic buying and shortages.
items.author: IriLine Desk
